source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
    SourceSchemaName,
    SourceTableName,
    ISNULL(SourceQuery,'') +
    '''' +
    ISNULL(
        CASE 
            WHEN WatermarkDataType = 'DATETIME'
                THEN ISNULL(NULLIF(LastWatermarkValue,'NULL'),'01/01/1900')
            WHEN WatermarkDataType = 'INT'
                THEN ISNULL(NULLIF(LastWatermarkValue,'NULL'),
                     UPPER(LEFT(WatermarkColumnName,1)) + '0')
            ELSE ISNULL(NULLIF(LastWatermarkValue,'NULL'),'')
        END,''
    )
    + '''' AS SourceQuery,
    SourceName,
    SourceServer,
    SourceDatabaseName,
    SourceDBUserName
FROM IncrementalLoadMetadata
WHERE IsActive = 1;
